genres.label: High Fantasy-Medieval
false_friends: ward meaning a dependent child or city district
level meaning social rank rather than advancement or dungeon depth
class meaning social estate rather than character role
spell meaning a period of time
summoned creature does not imply permanent ownership

genres.label: Dark Fantasy-Gothic
false_friends: corruption as occult transformation versus political bribery or damaged data
possession as spirit control versus legal ownership
sacrifice as a paid ritual cost versus an automatically authorized death
bloodline as ancestry rather than a blood resource
sanity pressure is not ordinary fear or morale

genres.label: Low Fantasy-Historical
false_friends: healing as medical recovery versus instant magical restoration
alchemy as historical craft versus supernatural transmutation
noble rank does not grant a combat ability
retainer as a social dependent rather than an automatically summoned unit
armor protection does not imply a magical ward

genres.label: Urban Fantasy-Modern

terms: favor owed to a supernatural court

false_friends: monster as supernatural entity versus a cruel human
veil as concealment magic versus ordinary fabric
possession as supernatural control versus legal ownership
viral haunting post is information rather than biological infection
modern setting does not imply that cameras can perceive every supernatural entity

genres.label: Mythological-Ancient World
false_friends: cult as ordinary organized worship rather than automatically a secret evil group
hero as a renowned protagonist rather than proof of moral goodness
sacrifice may be an offering and does not automatically mean killing a person
oracle as a person or institution versus a guaranteed true prediction
ritual pollution is not ordinary dirt or biological disease

genres.label: Eastern Fantasy-Wuxia/Xianxia

terms: launch the foe from the platform

false_friends: wuxia martial skill and xianxia cultivation are different capability bases
qi is not automatically interchangeable with mana
lightness skill is extraordinary movement but not proof of unaided flight
immortal can denote a cultivation status without proving literal invulnerability
dual cultivation can mean paired qi practice or sexual intercourse; infer sexual intercourse only from explicit local evidence

genres.label: Science Fantasy

terms: move a fleet through arcane hyperspace

false_friends: magic and technology remain separate grounding bases unless the world explicitly fuses them
psionics is not automatically magic
FTL travel is not the same action as teleportation
a possessed machine and malware-compromised machine have different causes
ancient technology does not imply supernatural authority

genres.label: Isekai-Parallel World

terms: send the target across the boundary
compare Earth knowledge with local practice
recreate modern technique with local materials

false_friends: isekai does not imply levels, statistics, status screens, respawn, or cheat powers
reincarnation is a body and identity transition rather than ordinary teleportation
summoned hero status does not grant an unlisted capability
cheat ability means an exceptional granted power and not hacking or deception
demon lord can be a title and does not prove species, moral alignment, or demonic powers

genres.label: Kingdom-Empire
false_friends: crown can mean a person, office, institution, currency, or physical object
realm is a political domain and not automatically another plane
levy can mean taxation or conscripted troops
authority is legal or institutional capacity rather than guaranteed obedience
succession claim does not itself transfer ledger ownership

genres.label: Dungeon-Fantasy
false_friends: level can mean dungeon depth, character advancement, or numeric magnitude
room does not imply safety
rest does not imply full recovery or elapsed time unless receipts settle it
trap as a hazard is not automatically a restraint status
clearing a room does not establish permanent ownership of the dungeon
